name: makestack-official
description: Official Makestack addons — modules, widgets, catalogues, and themes

inventory-stock.description: Track material and tool stock quantities, units, and reorder thresholds

costing.description: Record purchase prices and calculate project material costs

suppliers.description: Manage supplier and vendor contacts linked to catalogue entries

extended-widgets.description: Keyword renderers for stock levels, costs, and supplier references

leatherworking-starter.description: Starter catalogue: essential leatherworking tools, materials, techniques, and workflows

forge-theme.description: Forge theme — dark industrial palette with steel and amber accents
